Author: robtaylor_52029
Content: quick sanity check before I submit - Should I set the ID to something that's unlikely to clash?

Author: robtaylor_52029
Content: or is that set wafer.space side when the precheck is run?

Author: mole99
Content: The precheck does not check it against the other IDs, but the platform should prevent you from choosing an existing ID. The precheck will update the ID macros in your design with your chosen ID.

Author: robtaylor_52029
Content: ah, cool.

Author: robtaylor_52029
Content: thank you

Author: tholin
Content:
Oops, took me until now to get a repo going

Author: tholin
Content: The functional components are actually done, leaving me with a comfortable two weeks to get the art ready. There is a block of free space on the die reserved for it.

Author: tholin
Content:
@Tim 'mithro' Ansell This is the project I wish to use to officially test my SCL, as well as my multi-project setup using my SCL. I’m also using the level-shifting IO pads, but for having a 5V IO voltage and 3.3V core voltage, which should be interesting. Also has layouts generated by my custom flow tool, *analog* layouts meant for 3.3V operation and, of course, a bunch of CPUs.
Hoping to get a lot of mileage out of this one when it comes to testing things.
